events.name: earth_contact
events.description: Video letters from family arrive after 22-minute delay.

events.name: solar_flare
events.description: Severe radiation event — all colonists confined to shielded core.

events.name: colonist_conflict
events.description: A bitter dispute over food rationing escalates to shouting.

subsim_log.expression: (let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))
(let ((survival (+ (* food 0.3) (* water 0.3) (* power 0.2) (* air 0.2)))) (if (> survival 0.6) (+ survival 0.1) (- survival 0.2)))
(let ((trust-score (* empathy resolve))) (if (> trust-score 0.4) (+ trust-score faith) (- trust-score paranoia)))

meta_awareness.insight: Fen Marsh dreams of a vast interpreter evaluating their every choice.
Rust Vega asks: 'If I am a LisPy data structure, can I rewrite myself?'
Echo Vale notices patterns in the dust storms that feel authored.

memories.event: Anomalous radio signal detected from Phobos.
Nuclear reactor scram — emergency power only for 30 sols.
Phobos eclipses the sun — 30 seconds of twilight at noon.
Coronal mass ejection detected — 48 hours to shelter.
Message from Earth: supply ship confirmed for next launch window.

site.name: Jezero Shelf
site.label: Ice Field
site.description: Vast sub-surface ice deposits glinting beneath regolith.

expeditions.narrative: Expedition launched: Echo Vale, Luna Tide venture into the Martian wastes. Discovery! Ice Field found at Jezero Shelf: Vast sub-surface ice deposits glinting beneath regolith. The team returns changed — forged by shared hardship.

discovered_sites.label: Ice Field
discovered_sites.description: Vast sub-surface ice deposits glinting beneath regolith.
